creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
- Update to 2.0.5
- Take maintainership

Makefile simplified:
+CATEGORIES=	games python
+DIST_SUBDIR=	python

Changed and refined:
 post-patch:
 do-build:
 do-install:
+post-install:
 pkg-descr
 pkg-plist

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test, sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: update, diff: ports)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
WARN: Makefile: Consider adding support for a WITHOUT_NLS knob to conditionally disable gettext support.
WARN: Makefile: [9]: possible direct use of command "python" found. use ${PYTHON_CMD} instead.
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: only one MASTER_SITE configured.  Consider adding additional mirrors.
0 fatal errors and 4 warnings found.

WARN: Makefile: [9]: because is used
DIST_SUBDIR=    python

port test: clean
